step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the assessment. While both A (bacteria) and D (fungi) need to be eliminated by sterilization, spore-forming bacteria pose unique challenges due to their ability to resist standard disinfection methods until subjected to very high temperatures or chemical treatments designed specifically for this purpose. Therefore, focusing on eliminating spore formers underscores the necessity for comprehensive sterilization practices.
raw_response:
I agree with the assessment. While both A (bacteria) and D (fungi) need to be eliminated by sterilization, spore-forming bacteria pose unique challenges due to their ability to resist standard disinfection methods until subjected to very high temperatures or chemical treatments designed specifically for this purpose. Therefore, focusing on eliminating spore formers underscores the necessity for comprehensive sterilization practices.
